headline: Super Micro Computer Climbs 25% in April: 3 Reasons SMCI Is the Tech Sector’s Comeback Kid
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) are climbing again Thursday afternoon, up about 4% to $27.40. The move extends a dramatic one-month rebound for the artificial intelligence (AI) server maker. SMCI stock is up 25% in April, recovering from a brutal stretch that included an Oracle (NASDAQ:ORCL) contract cancellation and a swarm of legal filings. ... Super Micro Computer Climbs 25% in April: 3 Reasons SMCI Is the Tech Sector’s Comeback Kid
